selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
persona = null

response_raw:
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","opinion":"As an LLM, I understand the importance of having informed and respectful conversations about healthcare and COVID vaccines. Here are some tips on how to manage and deal with such discussions: 1. Listen actively and empathetically: Pay attention to what others are saying, and try to understand their perspective. Avoid interrupting or dismissing their views. 2. Provide evidence-based information: Share credible sources of information on COVID vaccines and healthcare. Be mindful of the language you use and avoid spreading misinformation. 3. Avoid personal attacks: Focus on the topic at hand, rather than making personal attacks on individuals. Use "
,"reasoning_summary":"Using active listening and providing evidence-based information can help to facilitate respectful conversations about healthcare and COVID vaccines. It is also important to avoid personal attacks and focus on the topic at hand. By following these tips, we can work towards creating a more informed and empathetic society.","tone":"informative and empathetic","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: As an LLM, I understand the importance of having informed and respectful conversations about healthcare and COVID vaccines. Here are some tips on how to manage and deal with such discussions: 1. Listen actively and empathetically: Pay attention to what others are saying, and try to understand their perspective. Avoid interrupting or dismissing their views. 2. Provide evidence-based information: Share credible sources of information on COVID vaccines and healthcare. Be mindful of the language you use and avoid spreading misinformation. 3. Avoid personal attacks: Focus on the topic at hand, rather than making personal attacks on individuals. Use
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Using active listening and providing evidence-based information can help to facilitate respectful conversations about healthcare and COVID vaccines. It is also important to avoid personal attacks and focus on the topic at hand. By following these tips, we can work towards creating a more informed and empathetic society.
